name: banyuan
description: 虽由人作，宛自天开 —— 以画布为山石，以组件为草木，以数据为活水，以 AI 为匠心，造一方数字园林。BanvasGL 自研 2D 引擎 + XiangDi AI Agent（SDD + Harness）+ Banyan 低代码平台。

scripts.dev:lunlunglass: pnpm --filter banvasgl build && concurrently --kill-others -c "magenta.bold,cyan.bold" -n banvasgl,lunlunglass "pnpm --filter banvasgl dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass dev"
scripts.dev:banyan: pnpm --filter banvasgl build && concurrently --kill-others -c "magenta.bold,cyan.bold" -n banvasgl,banyan "pnpm --filter banvasgl dev" "pnpm --filter banyan dev"
